news.paragraph: ServiceNow has partnered with Accenture to launch an engineering program aimed at scaling agentic AI for enterprise customers. This development highlights the company's strategic push into artificial intelligence. There are no imminent earnings or regulatory catalysts indicated in the current news headlines.

headlines.title: ServiceNow (NOW), Accenture Launch Engineering Program to Scale Agentic AI for Enterprises
